{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"2026032301451660D53208E634AE062B30\"}"},"total":472},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7332200021977105176","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者文笔好，很有生活气息的好作品，引人入胜，一个小要求，快点更新"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1707167866,"group_id":"7315726271692934206","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"不负遇见不谈亏欠！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyE7Gq3VENMPbXNu/bHIgXE=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776787248\u0026x-signature=NtetCP%2BD2YPkYr6bl%2BJMa04hBGU%3D","user_id":"102011926479","user_name":"爱象一阵风！"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"102011926479","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1663934175,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7315726271692934206","book_info":{"abstract":"特种兵精英赛归途，飞机遭遇雷电，结果穿越了，一个大好青春的单身狗来到异世成为了爷爷级老农，面对着那么多张嘴要养活，欲哭无泪。如何带领这群便宜孩子们过上好日子？唯有努力，凭着前世家传武学和外祖家皖南出名的文房四宝及制茶技艺，他终于站起来了。养兔，酿酒，制笔，忙的不亦乐乎！斗地主，斗奸商，斗宦官，斗的其乐无穷！做美食，做年画，做皮草赚的盆满钵满！想方设法搞到高产作物，花生，土豆，番薯，玉米样样惊动皇宫。三个美女倾心于他，他却只爱一个农家小寡妇。看特种兵如何在异世经营好小家，让天下老百姓如何摆脱灾荒饥饿的困扰。全文没有系统空间，没有大力金手指，主人公凭着前世本领一样玩转异世界。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/c6d1c00585bbd23436d363c12b31667d","author":"狂沙掩月","author_id":"","book_id":"7315726271692934206","book_name":"穿越古代成农夫小鲜肉特种兵想哭","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#182830","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":273,\"name\":\"历史古代\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273\u0026name=历史古代\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":37,\"name\":\"穿越\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37\u0026name=穿越\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":12,\"name\":\"历史\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12\u0026name=历史\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7315732898168963646","read_count":"15346","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"3406344"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.6","serial_count":"1613","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/4335d959b8df19cb70fad3006ad95e38~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779385516\u0026x-signature=ikyM2sKcAWnpDqjfHKnzPcJzoKI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"73330291677","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"65"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"2026032301451660D53208E634AE062B30\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":15246,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":6377},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1707184716,"author_reply_time":1707184771,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7370506433335509784","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"文笔流畅，情节跌宕起伏、精彩纷呈、引人入胜，古代奋斗养家题材里非常精彩优秀的一部小说，谢谢作者！男主开的杜家铺子，我觉得不如叫“杜鲁门”，男主有武力，精通器械制造，可以开宗立派办学办帮派，杜鲁门听起来有震慑力。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1716083449,"group_id":"7315726271692934206","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9DLOAdN9f82zCdKscejaOc=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p9-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/87097d0a540d4c5b8c0133ca2df6812b~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776789701\u0026x-signature=2hYMZvvtKzsH%2BJCmishTHOqLbqk%3D","user_id":"4628122508","user_name":"净心静气"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4628122508","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1649516854,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7315726271692934206","book_info":{"abstract":"特种兵精英赛归途，飞机遭遇雷电，结果穿越了，一个大好青春的单身狗来到异世成为了爷爷级老农，面对着那么多张嘴要养活，欲哭无泪。如何带领这群便宜孩子们过上好日子？唯有努力，凭着前世家传武学和外祖家皖南出名的文房四宝及制茶技艺，他终于站起来了。养兔，酿酒，制笔，忙的不亦乐乎！斗地主，斗奸商，斗宦官，斗的其乐无穷！做美食，做年画，做皮草赚的盆满钵满！想方设法搞到高产作物，花生，土豆，番薯，玉米样样惊动皇宫。三个美女倾心于他，他却只爱一个农家小寡妇。看特种兵如何在异世经营好小家，让天下老百姓如何摆脱灾荒饥饿的困扰。全文没有系统空间，没有大力金手指，主人公凭着前世本领一样玩转异世界。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/c6d1c00585bbd23436d363c12b31667d","author":"狂沙掩月","author_id":"","book_id":"7315726271692934206","book_name":"穿越古代成农夫小鲜肉特种兵想哭","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#182830","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_t
